plugins.name: android-tools
plugins.description: Android CLI tools: adb, emulator control, and device management

plugins.name: invoke-agent
plugins.description: Invoke external AI agents (Claude, Cursor Agent, Gemini) from Claude Code

plugins.name: worktree-tools
plugins.description: Open the current git worktree in a target environment: a cmux split pane, a new cmux workspace, or VS Code

plugins.name: cmux-tools
plugins.description: cmux remote-control helpers: inject Claude Code slash commands into local cmux panes, for a single session or broadcast to all

plugins.name: markdown-tools
plugins.description: View or open Markdown files: surface full content over remote control, or open locally in the macOS default app

plugins.name: pr-tools
plugins.description: GitHub pull request helpers: maintain a stacked-PR series section across a chain of PRs, and open a PR in Google Chrome
